name: 2pk Medium Open Storage Bins Clear - Brightroom™: Portable Plastic Utility, 13.2 Volume, Universal Organization
description:
Make clutter a thing of the past by organizing your space with this 2-Pack of Medium Open Storage Bins from Brightroom™. These medium-sized storage bins feature a rectangular silhouette with a flat base for storing anything from belts to wallets to stationery and beyond. The open top allows for easy access to the contents, while the nesting design offers space-saving storage. This pack includes two medium-sized storage bins, each featuring a clear construction for easy identification of the contents from the outside, while two side integrated handles make carrying a breeze.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
